parts.text: Can you check if the rocket mobile network is experiencing issues?
My rocket mobile device lost internet. Is there an outage?
Is the rocket mobile internet service down?

today

G home internet service is down?

G home internet suddenly went offline. Is this an outage?

G home internet in my area?

this morning

I’d like to check whether there’s an ongoing outage or a temporary network crash.
I need to know if the outage has been reported and how long it might take to restore service.
Is there a current network failure or scheduled maintenance in my area?
I think my home internet is part of an outage because even the modem lights are off.
None of my devices are connecting. Is there a known service disruption happening?

I want to make sure there isn’t a major outage before I reset all my devices.

phone lines
